Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ids=[j['id'] for j in d['data']]; print\('Job 1 in default view:', 1 in ids\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Hidden jobs after flag:', d['pagination']['total'], '| IDs:', [j['id'] for j in d['data']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Restored, is_not_fit:', d['data']['is_not_fit']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('loaded:', len\(d['data']\), 'total:', d['pagination']['total']\)")
